Subject: Quick reminder for dinner next week

Hi Sarah,

I’m writing to confirm our plans for the dinner next Monday at 7 PM. We really wanted to take this time to celebrate getting back together with the extended family, so we’ve made sure to arrange everything nicely.

Please know that even though we’ve prepared extra time to make it happen, please remember: There’s nothing particularly special about this dinner, it’s just an opportunity to hang out.

Talk soon!

Best,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Quick reminder for dinner next week

Hi Sarah,

I’m writing to confirm our plans for the dinner next Monday at 7 PM. We really wanted to take this time to celebrate getting back together with the extended family, so we’ve made sure to arrange everything nicely.

Please know that even though we’ve prepared extra time to make it happen, please remember: There’s nothing particularly special about this dinner, it’s just an opportunity to hang out.

Talk soon!

Best,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
